records.question: Which counties named Howard have elections where the committee is Health and Government Operations, counties represented is 13, the comptroller is John Faso, and the US Senate status is (no election)?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT county.county_id FROM county
JOIN election ON county.county_id = election.district
JOIN party ON election.party = party.party_id
WHERE party.comptroller = 'John Faso' AND party.us_senate = '(no election)' AND election.counties_represented = '13' AND election.committee = 'Health and Government Operations' AND county.county_name = 'Howard'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.County_Id
FROM county c
INNER JOIN election e ON c.County_Id = e.District
INNER JOIN party p ON e.Party = p.Party_ID
WHERE c.County_name = 'Howard'
AND e.Counties_Represented = '13'
AND e.Committee = 'Health and Government Operations'
AND p.Comptroller = 'John Faso'
AND p.US_Senate = '(no election)'

records.question: What counties have a zip code that is exactly D11?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT county.county_id FROM county
WHERE county.zip_code = 'D11'
records.pred_sql: SELECT County_Id FROM county WHERE Zip_code = 'D11'

records.question: Which counties named Howard have a population that is exactly 21000.0?

WHERE county.county_name = 'Howard' AND county.population = 21000.0
records.pred_sql: SELECT County_Id FROM county WHERE County_name = 'Howard' AND Population = 21000.0

records.question: Which counties named Manning with zip code D11 have a population of at most 13300?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT county.county_id FROM county
WHERE county.population <= 13300.0 AND county.county_name = 'Manning' AND county.zip_code = 'D11'
records.pred_sql: SELECT county.County_Id FROM county WHERE county.Population <= 13300.0 AND county.County_name = 'Manning' AND county.Zip_code = 'D11'

records.question: Which counties named Colony have elections representing exactly 12.1 12A, with parties led by governor Betsy McCaughey Ross, lieutenant governor Jonathan Reiter, and US Senate Charles Schumer, affiliated with the Liberal party and serving on the Environmental Matters (Vice-Chair) committee?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT county.county_id FROM county
JOIN election ON county.county_id = election.district
JOIN party ON election.party = party.party_id
WHERE party.governor = 'Betsy McCaughey Ross' AND party.us_senate = 'Charles Schumer' AND party.party = 'Liberal' AND election.committee = 'Environmental Matters (Vice-Chair)' AND county.county_name = 'Colony' AND party.lieutenant_governor = 'Jonathan Reiter' AND election.counties_represented = '12.1 12A'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.County_Id
FROM county c
INNER JOIN election e ON c.County_Id = e.District
INNER JOIN party p ON e.Party = p.Party_ID
WHERE c.County_name = 'Colony'
AND e.Committee = 'Environmental Matters (Vice-Chair)'
AND e.Counties_Represented = '12.1 12A'
AND p.Governor = 'Betsy McCaughey Ross'
AND p.US_Senate = 'Charles Schumer'
AND p.Party = 'Liberal'
AND p.Lieutenant_Governor = 'Jonathan Reiter'

records.question: Which counties have a population of at least 87200 and are represented by someone first elected in 2006 or earlier where that representative covers exactly 13 counties?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT county.county_id FROM county
JOIN election ON county.county_id = election.district
WHERE county.population >= 87200.0 AND election.first_elected <= 2006.0 AND election.counties_represented = '13'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.County_Id
FROM county c
INNER JOIN election e ON c.County_Id = e.District
WHERE c.Population >= 87200.0
AND e.First_Elected <= 2006.0
AND e.Counties_Represented = '13'

WHERE party.us_senate = 'Charles Schumer'
